declarations.name: IgcGridStateComponent
declarations.description: State component allows saving and restoring the state of the grid features.

members.name: options
members.description: An object with options determining if a certain feature state should be saved.

members.name: applyState
members.description: Restores grid features' state based on the IGridStateInfo object passed as an argument.

members.name: applyStateFromString
members.description: Restores grid features' state based on the serialized IGridState object passed as an argument.

members.name: getState
members.description: Gets the state of a feature or states of all grid features, unless a certain feature is disabled through the `options` property.

members.name: getStateAsString
members.description: Gets the state of a feature or states of all grid features, unless a certain feature is disabled through the `options` property.

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: An object with options determining if a certain feature state should be saved.

events.name: stateParsed
events.description: Event emitted when set state is called with a string.  Returns the parsed state object so that it can be further modified before applying to the grid.

members.description: The summaryFormatter is used to format the display of the column summaries. The summaries with the count key are skipped so they are displayed as numbers.

members.description: Indicates whether the column will be visible when its parent is collapsed.

members.description: Sets/gets the parent column.

members.name: topLevelParent
members.description: Returns a reference to the top level parent column.

members.name: pin
members.description: Pins the column in the specified position at the provided index in that pinned area.  Defaults to index `0` if not provided, or to the initial index in the pinned area.  Returns `true` if the column is successfully pinned. Returns `false` if the column cannot be pinned.  Column cannot be pinned if:  - Is already pinned  - index argument is out of range

members.name: unpin
members.description: Unpins the column and place it at the provided index in the unpinned area.  Defaults to index `0` if not provided, or to the initial index in the unpinned area.  Returns `true` if the column is successfully unpinned. Returns `false` if the column cannot be unpinned.  Column cannot be unpinned if:  - Is already unpinned  - index argument is out of range

members.name: move
members.description: Moves a column to the specified visible index.  If passed index is invalid, or if column would receive a different visible index after moving, moving is not performed.  If passed index would move the column to a different column group. moving is not performed.

members.description: Autosize the column to the longest currently visible cell value, including the header cell.

declarations.description: **Ignite UI for Angular Column** -  [Documentation](https://www.infragistics.com/products/ignite-ui-angular/angular/components/grid/grid#columns-configuration)   The Ignite UI Column is used within an `igx-grid` element to define what data the column will show. Features such as sorting,  filtering & editing are enabled at the column level.  You can also provide a template containing custom content inside  the column using `ng-template` which will be used for all cells within the column.

attributes.name: child-data-key

attributes.description: Sets the foreign key of the `IgxTreeGridComponent`.

attributes.name: has-children-key
attributes.description: Sets the key indicating whether a row has children.  This property is only used for load on demand scenarios.

attributes.name: cascade-on-delete
attributes.description: Sets whether child records should be deleted when their parent gets deleted.  By default it is set to true and deletes all children along with the parent.

attributes.name: load-children-on-demand
attributes.description: Sets a callback for loading child rows on demand.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Sets the value of the `id` attribute. If not provided it will be automatically generated.

attributes.name: root-records
attributes.description: Returns an array of the root level `ITreeGridRecord`s.

attributes.name: processed-root-records
attributes.description: Returns an array of processed (filtered and sorted) root `ITreeGridRecord`s.

attributes.name: data
attributes.description: Gets/Sets the array of data that populates the component.

attributes.name: expansion-depth
attributes.description: Sets the count of levels to be expanded in the `IgxTreeGridComponent`. By default it is  set to `Infinity` which means all levels would be expanded.

attributes.name: snackbar-display-time
attributes.description: Gets/Sets the display time for the row adding snackbar notification.

attributes.name: auto-generate
attributes.description: Gets/Sets whether to auto-generate the columns.

attributes.name: auto-generate-exclude
attributes.description: Gets/Sets a list of property keys to be excluded from the generated column collection

attributes.description: Controls whether columns moving is enabled in the grid.

attributes.description: Controls the copy behavior of the grid.

attributes.description: Sets a conditional class selector to the grid's row element.  Accepts an object literal, containing key-value pairs,  where the key is the name of the CSS class and the value is  either a callback function that returns a boolean, or boolean, like so:

attributes.name: row-styles
attributes.description: Sets conditional style properties on the grid row element.  It accepts an object literal where the keys are  the style properties and the value is an expression to be evaluated.

members.description: Returns if the current page is the last page.

members.name: isFirstPage
members.description: Returns if the current page is the first page.

members.description: Goes to the next page of the `IgxPaginatorComponent`, if the paginator is not already at the last page.

members.name: previousPage
members.description: Goes to the previous page of the `IgxPaginatorComponent`, if the paginator is not already at the first page.

members.name: paginate
members.description: Goes to the desired page index.
